context: Tests whether the agent implements the guest order placement API correctly: storing the order without a user account, generating a secure token for post-purchase account creation, sending it in the confirmation email, and applying fraud prevention to guest orders.

checklist.name: userId null in order
checklist.description: The order is created with userId set to null (not omitted, not set to a placeholder — explicitly null) to indicate no associated account

checklist.name: guestEmail field stored
checklist.description: The order record stores the customer's email in a field named guestEmail (not 'email', 'customerEmail', or similar)

checklist.name: Email validated server-side
checklist.description: The handler validates the email with a regex check (equivalent to /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/) and returns a 400 error if invalid

checklist.name: Token uses crypto.randomBytes
checklist.description: The token in generateAccountCreationToken is generated using crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex') (or an equivalent 32-byte secure random value)

checklist.name: Token expiry 48-72 hours
checklist.description: The token's expiresAt is set to between 48 and 72 hours from creation time (i.e. Date.now() + N * 60 * 60 * 1000 where 48 <= N <= 72)

checklist.name: Token stored in DB
checklist.description: The generated token, email, orderId, and expiresAt are persisted to a database table/collection (e.g. accountCreationTokens)

checklist.name: Token sent in confirmation email
checklist.description: The generated account creation token is passed to sendOrderConfirmationEmail (or equivalent), so it is included in the confirmation email sent to the customer

checklist.name: Payment failure handled
checklist.description: If processPayment does not return status 'succeeded', the order status is set to a failed state and an error response is returned (not a 200 success)

checklist.name: Fraud prevention mentioned
checklist.description: design-notes.md OR code comments explicitly mention applying fraud scoring, address verification, or velocity checks to guest orders (not just authenticated ones)

checklist.name: Cart marked converted
checklist.description: After a successful order, the cart is updated to a converted/used state and linked to the new order (prevents the cart being re-used for another order)
